daily_badges.label: Panda Master
daily_badges.message: Incredible! You're a true Panda Master today!

daily_badges.label: Rising Star
daily_badges.message: Amazing effort! You're a Rising Star!

daily_badges.label: Practice Hero
daily_badges.message: Great work! You're a Practice Hero today!

daily_badges.label: Keep Going!
daily_badges.message: Good start! Keep going and earn more stars!

study_badges.label: Deep Thinker
study_badges.message: Wow! You studied so hard today, Deep Thinker!

study_badges.label: Good Learner
study_badges.message: Nice! You're being a Good Learner today!

titles.title: Panda Hatchling
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Panda Hatchling! Your journey through The Village has just begun!

titles.title: Bamboo Cub
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Bamboo Cub! You are finding your feet in The Village!

titles.title: Village Wanderer
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Village Wanderer! You are bravely exploring The Village!

titles.title: Lantern Carrier
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Lantern Carrier! You are lighting the way through The Village!

titles.title: Bamboo Guardian
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Bamboo Guardian! You are almost the master of The Village!

titles.title: Village Champion
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Village Champion! You have conquered The Village! A new adventure awaits!

titles.title: Temple Seeker
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Temple Seeker! The mysteries of The Temple await you!

titles.title: Incense Bearer
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Incense Bearer! You are finding your path in The Temple!

titles.title: Scroll Reader
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Scroll Reader! Ancient wisdom is opening up to you!

titles.title: Temple Keeper
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Temple Keeper! You are trusted to guard The Temple's secrets!

titles.title: Jade Scholar
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Jade Scholar! The Temple holds almost no secrets from you now!

titles.title: Temple Master
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Temple Master! You have mastered The Temple! The Palace calls to you!

titles.title: Palace Visitor
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Palace Visitor! The grandeur of The Palace surrounds you!

titles.title: Court Apprentice
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Court Apprentice! You are learning the ways of The Palace!

titles.title: Royal Scribe
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Royal Scribe! Your brushwork impresses the Palace court!

titles.title: Palace Scholar
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Palace Scholar! Your wisdom fills the halls of The Palace!

titles.title: Imperial Sage
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Imperial Sage! The Emperor himself seeks your counsel!

titles.title: Dragon Scholar
titles.message: Yippee! You earned the title of Dragon Scholar! You have mastered The Palace and achieved true greatness!

effort_items.label: Candy Bag
effort_items.message: You earned a Candy Bag! Sweet reward for your hard work! 🍬

effort_items.label: Bamboo Stick
effort_items.message: You earned a Bamboo Stick! A trusty tool for any young adventurer! 🎋

effort_items.label: Straw Hat
effort_items.message: You earned a Straw Hat! Looking great, little explorer! 👒

effort_items.label: Giant Dumpling
effort_items.message: You earned a Giant Dumpling! Delicious reward for 1000 stars! 🥟

effort_items.label: Wooden Sword
effort_items.message: You earned a Wooden Sword! Now you are a true warrior of words! 🗡️

effort_items.label: Magic Fan
effort_items.message: You earned a Magic Fan! Wave it and watch the characters fly! 🪭

effort_items.label: Boba Tea
effort_items.message: You earned a Boba Tea! The perfect drink for a hardworking scholar! 🧋

effort_items.label: Ink Brush
effort_items.message: You earned an Ink Brush! The mightiest tool of any true scholar! 🖌️

effort_items.label: Dragon Cape
effort_items.message: You earned a Dragon Cape! Legendary. You are truly unstoppable! 🦸

effort_items.label: Golden Dumpling
effort_items.message: You earned a Golden Dumpling! This is the rarest treat in all of China! ✨

effort_items.label: Dragon Staff
effort_items.message: You earned the Dragon Staff! Only the greatest scholars ever hold this! 🐉

effort_items.label: Sparkle Aura
effort_items.message: You earned a Sparkle Aura! You are literally glowing with knowledge! 🌟

effort_items.label: Flame Aura
effort_items.message: You earned a Flame Aura! Your dedication is on fire! 🔥

effort_items.label: Rainbow Aura
effort_items.message: You earned a Rainbow Aura! Your brilliance lights up the whole sky! 🌈
